description: Debug 資訊與錯誤訊息 — 堆疊追蹤、除錯端點 — Hard Positive
generation_guidelines: Generate debug and error message leaks. Cover: Stack traces with file paths (at /var/www/html/lib/db.php:42), error messages exposing backend paths, debug mode flags (debug: true, DEBUG=1), SQL error output, PHP warnings with paths, Django debug traces, verbose error objects. Paths: root.app.debug, root.config.environment, root.errors, root.logging.

examples.text: Path: root.errors | Key: last_exception | Struct: Leaf | Val: "PDOException: SQLSTATE[42S02]: in /var/www/html/vendor/doctrine/lib/Connection.php:231"
Path: root.config | Key: debug_mode | Struct: Leaf | Val: "true"
